full_text:
Sima Xun (Xianda) 司馬恂 (顯達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Xun (司馬恂), styledXianda (顯達). Son of Sima Fang, was a mid-ranking civil officer under Wei. Sima Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
